persuasive_frame.fear_to_disarm: Will my kid be safe? Will Sunday morning actually work for our family without becoming another logistics problem?
persuasive_frame.desire_to_name: A church that respects our family's time and treats our kids as more than a daycare problem
persuasive_frame.proof_to_offer: Named Kids Wing entrance through the carport, 30-second check-in, vetted staff, four service times across Sunday morning, multigenerational community where kids are around adults who aren't their parents
persuasive_frame.register_notes: Practical and specific. Times, places, names. Warm without saccharine. Acknowledge that getting the family out the door is hard.

strategic_setup.metadata_title: Kids at Riverwood Chapel | Kent OH
strategic_setup.metadata_description: Open Arms Nursery, preschool, and elementary programs in the Kids Wing. Pre-register your child for Sunday.
strategic_setup.aeo_smart_snippet: Riverwood Chapel in Kent, Ohio offers Sunday kids programs from newborns through 5th grade. The Kids Wing hosts Open Arms Nursery, preschool, and elementary classes using the Gospel Project curriculum at 9, 10:15, and 11:30am. Pre-register through Church Center.

sections.section_job: Make a parent on the fence feel that their kid has a specific, safe, organized place to land on Sunday morning

field_values.heading: Kids
field_values.description: Sundays your kids will look forward to. Riverwood partners with parents to help your kid know Jesus and feel known by the people teaching them.

heading: Kids
Kids Wing
For Your Kids
description: Sundays your kids will look forward to. Riverwood partners with parents to help your kid know Jesus and feel known by the people teaching them.
Your kid will be known here. Riverwood partners with parents to help kids know Jesus and grow up in a church that knows their name.
You want your kids to love church, not just attend it. Riverwood's Kids Wing partners with parents to help your kid know Jesus and be known by the people walking with them.

sections.voice_check_notes: Heading is page label (clean, navigational). Tagline = informational qualifier (ages + service times). Description addresses Suburban Family's fear (safety + logistics) with specifics (Kids Wing, carport, 30-second check-in). Branded vocab honored. Writes toward section_job.

sections.section_job: Promise partnership with parents in faith formation — not babysitting, not entertainment

field_values.heading: What your kids learn
field_values.description: Sunday school at Riverwood is a partnership with parents in childhood discipleship. Kids walk through the Gospel Project, a curriculum that takes them through the whole Bible across their years in these classes. They get real Bible teaching, not babysitting between songs.

sections.voice_check_notes: Lifted Gospel Project curriculum framing. Description addresses parent's desire (real teaching, not babysitting). Jesus implied via 'gospel' theme. 'Your' framing throughout.

sections.section_job: Make each parent feel their specific kid (newborn, preschooler, elementary) has a tier built for them

field_values.heading: By age
field_values.description: Three age tiers across every Sunday service.

items.description_card: Infants through toddlers. Welcome, Bible stories, playtime, and snack at 9, 10:15, and 11:30am. Kids graduate to Jr Pre K at age 3 and when potty-trained.
Ages 3 through Kindergarten. Gospel Project curriculum at 9, 10:15, and 11:30am.
1st through 4th grade. Gospel Project curriculum at 9, 10:15, and 11:30am.

sections.voice_check_notes: 3 age-tier atoms lifted verbatim as cards. Each tier gets specifics (ages, times, what happens).

sections.section_job: Disarm the drop-off anxiety by walking through the 30-second check-in process step by step

items.step_description: Use the Church Center link before you arrive. Saves you the line.

items.step_label: Stop at the New Families Desk
items.step_description: Right inside the Foyer. Greeters walk you to your child's class.

items.step_label: Drop off and collect a pager
items.step_description: Kids Wing is to the LEFT of the Foyer. Birth through 6th grade.
Bring your pager back to the same room. Quick and quiet.

sections.voice_check_notes: 4-step process disarms drop-off anxiety with specifics (where, what, how long). Foyer + Kids Wing branded vocab.

sections.section_job: Convert intent into action — pre-register so check-in is fast on Sunday morning

buttons.items.0.label: Pre-register at Church Center
Pre-register your kids
Pre-register now
description: Two minutes now saves you the Sunday-morning rush.
A minute now is one less thing Sunday morning.
Pre-register before Sunday so check-in is fast.

sections.voice_check_notes: Direct verb CTA. Description quantifies the time saved (2 min) to reduce friction.

page_audit.voice_match: Reads like Riverwood's voice card: plain-spoken, specific, addresses the Suburban Family's actual concern (safety + logistics). Uses branded vocabulary (Kids Wing, Foyer, carport). No clichés, no AI words, no church-speak. Heading is a clean label per v2 architecture.
page_audit.alternatives_summary: Hero tagline: picked ages+times over program-name-list (better at-a-glance utility for parent on the fence). Hero description: picked 'your kids have their own space...' over 'Sundays at Riverwood...' (addresses safety+logistics most directly). CTA label: picked 'Pre-register at Church Center' (names the platform) over 'Pre-register your kids' (heading already says that).

gaps_flagged.reason: Optional secondary hero CTA — no atom supports a second action.
